Three ways to get from A to B, including movement through A.
Three ways to get from A to B, modulo movement through A.
policy 3 chooses this action, expanding policy 2's action
policy 2 chooses this action expanding policy 1's action
possible "state" in 1-part counterpoint at beat number t
possible "state" in 2-part counterpoint at beat number t

0.b1b2b3

STEP 1.1:
Explore + train on bottom tier until exhausted

STEP 0:
Contract everything to a point.

STEP −1:
Start here.

STEP 1.2:
Freeze all future exploration of present tier, and freeze best path.

STEP k.3:
Lift best path to upstairs train

STEP k.2:
Freeze all future exploration of present tier, and freeze best path.

STEP 1.3:
Lift best path to upstairs train

STEP 2.1:
Explore + train on next tier until exhausted

STEP k.1:
Explore + train on next tier until exhausted
Three ways to get from A to B, including movement through A.
Three ways to get from A to B, modulo movement through A.
